lemmas: (p : α → Bool) (xs ys zs : List α) : filter p ((xs ++ ys) ++ zs) = filter p xs ++ filter p ys ++ filter p zs
(p : α → Bool) (xs : List α) : filter p ([] ++ xs) = filter p xs
(p : α → Bool) (xs : List α) : filter p (xs ++ []) = filter p xs
(x : Nat) (xs : List Nat) : x ∈ ins x xs
(x : Nat) (xs : List Nat) : x ∈ ins1 x xs
(xs : List α) : dropWhile (fun _ => False) xs = xs
(n : Nat) (xs : List α) (ys : List β) : drop n (zip' xs ys) = zip' (drop n xs) (drop n ys)
(n : Nat) (xs : List α) (ys : List α) : drop n (xs ++ ys) = drop n xs ++ drop (n - length xs) ys
(n m : Nat) (xs : List α) : drop n (take m xs) = take (m - n) (drop n xs)
(x : Nat) (xs : List Nat) : sorted xs = true → sorted (insort x xs) = true
(xs : List Nat) : sorted (sort xs) = true
(x y : Nat) : ¬ x ≤ y → y ≤ x
(n : Nat) (xs : List α) : drop n ([] ++ xs) = drop n xs
(n : Nat) (xs : List α) : drop n (xs ++ []) = drop n xs
(n : Nat) (xs : List α) : drop n ([] : List α) = []
(n : Nat) (xs : List α) : take n ([] : List α) = []
(n : Nat) (xs : List α) : zip' ([] : List α) xs = []
(n : Nat) (xs : List α) : zip' xs ([] : List β) = []
(x : Nat) : sorted (insort x []) = true
(x y : Nat) : x ≤ y → insort x (y :: []) = x :: y :: []
(x y : Nat) : ¬ x ≤ y → insort x (y :: []) = y :: x :: []
(x y z : Nat) (zs : List Nat) : x ≤ z → insort x (z :: zs) = x :: z :: zs
(x y z : Nat) (zs : List Nat) : ¬ x ≤ z → insort x (z :: zs) = z :: insort x zs
(y z : Nat) (zs : List Nat) : sorted (y :: z :: zs) = true → y ≤ z
(y z : Nat) (zs : List Nat) : sorted (y :: z :: zs) = true → sorted (z :: zs) = true
(n : Nat) (xs : List α) : drop (n + 1) xs = drop n (drop 1 xs)
(n : Nat) (xs : List α) : take (n + 1) xs = take n xs ++ take 1 (drop n xs)
(n m : Nat) : m - n = Nat.pred (m + 1 - (n + 1))
(n m : Nat) : n - m = n + 1 - (m + 1)
(xs : List α) (ys : List β) : zip' xs ys = [] → xs = [] ∨ ys = []
(n : Nat) (xs : List α) (ys : List β) : length (zip' (drop n xs) (drop n ys)) ≤ length (zip' xs ys)
(p : α → Bool) (xs ys : List α) : filter p (xs ++ ys) = [] ↔ filter p xs = [] ∧ filter p ys = []
(p : α → Bool) (xs : List α) : filter p xs ++ [] = filter p xs
(n : Nat) (xs : List α) : drop n xs = [] → drop (n + 1) xs = []
(n m : Nat) (xs : List α) : n ≤ m → drop n (take m xs) = take (m - n) (drop n xs)
